case_title: BARRETTE, KENNETH M. VS ENGELSTEIN,CHARLES EX-REP.PAYEE

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,900.00 FILED BY BARRETTE, KENNETH M. AS TO DEFENDANT ENGELSTEIN,CHARLES EX-REP.PAYEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BARRETTE, KENNETH M. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT ENGELSTEIN,CHARLES EX-REP.PAYEE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO CHARLES ENGELSTEIN (SOUPMAKER) RETURNED SIGNED.
